IndexPage.title: Job Tracker
IndexPage.description: Job Tracker is a job seeker's tracking tool. Let's get you on your way to your next dream gig!

HomePage.emptyStateDescription: Your command center is currently empty. Add your first event to start tracking your job search journey.

SignInPage.signInDescription: Sign in to your account to continue tracking your jobs.
SignInPage.oauthAccountNotLinked: To confirm your identity, sign in with the same account you used originally.
SignInPage.signInError: An error occurred during sign in. Please try again.
SignInPage.termsAndPrivacy: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
